news.summary: Rio Tinto, a diversified global miner, is increasing its focus on direct lithium extraction (DLE) technology by investing in Chile's Maricunga project in cooperation with Chile's state-owned Codelco. The investment is expected to reach up to $900 million in the lithium-rich salt flat, making it a significant lithium development in the country. DLE technology differs from traditional evaporation ponds by allowing for lithium extraction directly from brine using chemical or mechanical processes, reducing land use and water consumption. This method can be utilized in arid regions where water is scarce. While considered a potential game-changer for the industry, DLE has yet to be proven and has not been used commercially in Chile. The success of the project and investor confidence will depend on the ability to scale up operations efficiently and reliably.
news.headline: Rio Tinto invests $900 million in Chile's lithium project using DLE technology, aiming to extract lithium directly from brine more efficiently and sustainably.

news.summary: Today in New York, Megan Thee Stallion's legal team disclosed substantial proof of Tory Lanez's 2022 conviction, countering misinformation regarding her shooting incident. Rejecting claims by Lanez's team, the evidence was presented to challenge the false narratives. Access the complete presentation for more details.
news.headline: Megan Thee Stallion's legal team reveals evidence of Tory Lanez's conviction, refutes false narratives, full presentation linked.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $75,000 in Everus during the period from October 31, 2024, to February 11, 2025, to reach out to him directly to explore potential courses of action.
news.headline: Investors with losses exceeding $75,000 in Everus between Oct 31, 2024 and Feb 11, 2025 are encouraged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP.

news.summary: A company named L'Mychele & Associates LLC recently unveiled its inauguration as a high-end firm specializing in managing, consulting, and strategizing meetings and events. This premium company is adopting a purpose-driven methodology for organizing corporate, nonprofit, and exclusive social gatherings in the United States and other countries.
news.headline: L'Mychele & Associates LLC launches as a premium events firm, offering meetings & strategy services globally.

news.summary: In Washington, Grant Thornton, a leading professional services brand in the U.S., revealed the addition of Storme Sixeas to its Washington National Tax Office (WNTO) as the new Tax Legislative Affairs leader. In this position, Sixeas will manage the relationship between tax policy and government, acting as a reliable consultant to clients on tax legislative issues. Possessing over twenty years of experience, Sixeas will play a key role in providing guidance to clients.
news.headline: Storme Sixeas joins Grant Thornton as Tax Legislative Affairs leader in Washington, providing expertise on tax policy and government.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™ forecasts a significant growth in the global night vision device market, with an expected increase from USD 8.57 billion in 2025 to USD 12.91 billion by 2030. This reflects a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.5%. The rise is attributed to advancements in imaging technologies, among other factors.
news.headline: Global night vision device market to grow from $8.57B in 2025 to $12.91B by 2030, with 8.5% CAGR as per MarketsandMarkets™.

news.summary: Mayor Mike Duggan's innovative approach is revolutionizing Detroit by converting vacant land into renewable energy sources, marking a significant milestone in the city's sustainable growth. The initiative, launched on May 22, 2025, aims to transform abandoned spaces into solar and wind energy farms, creating a blueprint for urban revitalization projects nationwide. Under Mayor Duggan's guidance, Detroit is paving the way for a greener and more prosperous future, with the potential to generate hundreds of megawatts of clean energy and provide tangible benefits to local communities. This groundbreaking project underscores the city's commitment to environmental stewardship and economic development, positioning Detroit as a model for sustainable urban planning.
news.headline: Detroit reaches milestone in renewable energy as Mayor Duggan's initiative transforms vacant land into solar neighborhoods, setting urban revitalization example.

news.summary: A newly released modular tool from Aecooly, a tech brand specializing in outdoor gear, offers over 10 accessories tailored for various purposes. This multi-functional tool includes a jet fan, handheld fan, camping light, arc lighter, power bank, and air pump. Launched on Kickstarter on May 22, 2025, this versatile tool aims to cater to a wide range of needs for outdoor enthusiasts.
news.headline: The CamperKit, a versatile modular tool with 10+ accessories, launches on Kickstarter by Aecooly for outdoor enthusiasts.

news.summary: PARKER, Colo., May 22, 2025 - KELYN Technologies, Inc., a leading provider of data protection, backup, and recovery solutions, has recently appointed Joe Shields, a seasoned industry professional known for his extensive experience in finance, systems management, and growth-oriented leadership. The appointment of Shields as part of the company's leadership team signifies a strategic move to leverage his expertise in driving organizational development.
news.headline: KELYN Technologies names Joe Shields as CFO, offering expertise in finance and growth leadership.

news.summary: A recently launched brand campaign by Rodan + Fields Beauty, LLC, showcases the scientific basis and effectiveness of their skincare products throughout life stages. The campaign, unveiled in San Francisco on May 22, 2025, emphasizes the visible outcomes of R+F's skincare range. The Company, founded by the top Female Dermatologists, is renowned for its innovative products in the industry.
news.headline: Rodan + Fields launches "Love What You See" campaign celebrating skincare journeys, emphasizing visible results. #R+F #skincare

news.summary: A recent report by The Research Insights predicts that the worldwide automotive semiconductor market, valued at USD 44.94 billion in 2023, is expected to increase to USD 77.76 billion by 2030. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.1%. The projections reflect the continuous advancements in vehicle technology and the increasing demand for semiconductor components in the automotive industry.
news.headline: Global automotive semiconductor market to reach $77.76B by 2030, growing at 8.1% CAGR from $44.94B in 2023, per The Research Insights.

news.summary: In Olympia, Washington, May marks National Motorcycle Safety Awareness Month, with officials aiming for a drop in fatal motorcycle accidents. With the arrival of warmer weather and improved road conditions, the Department of Licensing (DOL) and Washington Traffic Safety Commission (WTSC) are urging all drivers - be it cars, trucks, or motorcycles - to responsibly navigate roadways. Statistics from the Washington State Department of Transportation indicate a decline in motorcyclist fatalities, highlighting the importance of road safety initiatives during this time.
news.headline: Motorcyclist fatalities in Washington reduced in 2024, down by 23% from last year. Safety awareness emphasized.

news.summary: The Cleveland Museum of Natural History has been recognized for its excellence by being included in the 2025 World's Most Beautiful Museums List by Prix Versailles. Prix Versailles is a renowned global architecture and design award program established in 2015 and held annually at UNESCO. This prestigious honor showcases the museum's impressive architectural and design features to a worldwide audience. The selection reaffirms the museum's position as a premier cultural institution, with an annual attendance of over 500,000 visitors and a collection of more than 4 million artifacts.
news.headline: Cleveland Museum of Natural History listed as one of the world's most beautiful museums by Prix Versailles 2025.

news.summary: A new initiative is being launched at the University of Maryland's Robert H Smith School of Business in College Park. The Ed Snider Center for Enterprise and Markets, in partnership with the Network Contagion Research, will delve into the impact of social media on financial markets. This venture, commencing on May 22, 2025, aims to analyze how online platforms influence market trends. Stay tuned for insights and findings from this collaboration.
news.headline: UMD's Snider Center launches lab focused on social media's impact on financial markets in collaboration with Network Contagion Research.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $100,000 in Ibotta to reach out to him for a direct consultation regarding their potential avenues. If you have bought or obtained shares of Ibotta connected to certain events, you are encouraged to discuss your options with Mr. Wilson.
news.headline: Investors with losses over $100,000 in Ibotta urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi LLP about potential claims.

news.summary: Cutting-edge transmission technologies are set to enhance grid capacity, enhance reliability, and decrease expenses in the energy sector. In Washington, on May 22, 2025, Carter Harms, a member of The Pew Charitable Trusts' energy modernization initiative, emphasized the crucial need for this progress. The increasing electricity demand, which is currently skyrocketing, necessitates proactive measures to address capacity constraints. Harms stressed the urgency of leveraging innovative solutions to ensure grid stability and cost-effectiveness amidst this escalating demand.
news.headline: Utah and Indiana enhancing grids with advanced technologies to meet rising electricity demand and reduce costs.

news.summary: Deloitte recently revealed the extension of Silicon to Service (S2S) for government and public services, offering a faster deployment option for government agencies aiming to utilize secure, customizable, and reliable AI solutions to accomplish their mission objectives. This expansion, effective as of May 22, 2025, is designed to cater to the specific needs of government entities seeking efficient AI implementation support.
news.headline: Deloitte partners with Dell and NVIDIA for Silicon to Service, offering government agencies faster AI deployment.

news.summary: On May 22, 2025, in San Francisco, The API security platform StackHawk revealed a new injection of $12 million from Sapphire and Castanoa Ventures. This fresh funding aims to assist security teams in adapting to the rapid advancements in AI-driven development.
news.headline: StackHawk receives $12M in funding from Sapphire and Castanoa Ventures to support API security in AI-driven development.

news.summary: In San Francisco, RevenueCat, a prominent platform for overseeing consumer app monetization, disclosed raising a Series C funding round totaling $50 million. This round was spearheaded by Bain Capital Ventures, with contributions from existing investors Index Ventures, Y Combinator, Adjacent, Volo Ventures, and SaaStr Fund. This latest funding augments the previous Series C round of $12 million from the previous year, bringing the total funds accrued to $100 million thus far. Mark Fiorentino commented, "RevenueCat is currently experiencing a significant turning point."
news.headline: RevenueCat secures $50M in Series C funding round, total raised now at $100M. Leading platform for app monetization.

news.summary: Cboe Canada has announced that Onco-Innovations Limited can now be traded on their platform using the ticker symbol ONCO.
news.headline: Onco-Innovations is now available for trading on Cboe Canada with the ticker symbol ONCO.

news.summary: The Niagara Falls Convention Centre has been chosen as the venue for an upcoming wrestling spectacle named "The Border Brawl". In a bold move, Zone·ify recently published full-page ads in The New York Post and The Toronto Star, extending an open invitation to President Donald J. Trump and Prime Minister Mark Carney to attend this event. The showdown is scheduled to take place on May 25 and will be broadcast live in both Canada and the USA. The event promises to be an intense no-holds-barred competition that aims to grab the attention of spectators on both sides of the border.
news.headline: Zone·ify invites Trump & Carney to “The Border Brawl”, a wrestling spectacle in Niagara Falls on May 25, streaming free in Canada & USA.

news.summary: Pixee, a company based in Baltimore, has revealed that it successfully secured $15 million in seed funding. Decibel and Wing VC spearheaded this funding round, supplemented by TEDCO, PrimeSet, and other strategic partners such as Zach Holman, Alex Rice, and Brian Chess. These strategic investors bring a wealth of experience, with backgrounds in well-known companies like GitHub and Oracle. The infusion of capital will be pivotal in furthering Pixee's goal of enabling security teams to rival the efficiency of AI-powered development tools.
news.headline: Pixee raises $15M in seed funding, led by Decibel and Wing VC, with participation from TEDCO, PrimeSet, & others.

news.summary: In Hong Kong, the Blockchain Deposit Insurance Corporation (BDIC) has made a significant announcement regarding the appointment of James R. Owens to its Board of Advisors. BDIC is a pioneering entity that offers decentralized deposit insurance for cryptocurrency wallets and exchanges. The Co-Founder of BDIC Hong Kong, Paul Kohli, expressed his delight at the appointment, emphasizing James’ crucial role in providing guidance on technical strategies related to exchange and wallet connectivity, along with advancements in smart contracts. This move underscores BDIC's commitment to innovation and expertise in the cryptocurrency sector.
news.headline: Blockchain Deposit Insurance Corporation (BDIC) appoints tech visionary James R. Owens to advisory board, focusing on exchange and wallet connectivity.

news.summary: In New York, OpenFX, a company transforming cross-border payments, has revealed itself after operating in secret, securing $23 million in funding. The investment, predominantly spearheaded by Accel, also involves contributions from NFX, Lightspeed Faction, Castle Island Ventures, Flybridge, Hash3, along with key fintech investors. This announcement comes on the heels of the firm's significant progress, achieving a remarkable increase from zero to $10 billion in annualized transaction volume within less than a year since its covert initiation in early 2024. The company was established by ser...
news.headline: OpenFX secures $23M funding led by Accel, NFX, Lightspeed Faction, etc., after reaching $10B transaction volume in under 12 months.

news.summary: In New York, Morgan Stanley Investment Management (MSIM) revealed its decision to sell its ownership stake in Seven Seas Water Group to EQT Infrastructure VI fund. Seven Seas Water Group, a company specializing in water and wastewater treatment plants in North America, will undergo this ownership transfer. The investment was facilitated through funds managed by Morgan Stanley Infrastructure Partners (MSIP), the private infrastructure investment platform of MSIM. This development marks a notable transition in the ownership structure of the company.
news.headline: Morgan Stanley sells ownership stake in Seven Seas Water Group to EQT Infrastructure VI fund.

news.summary: Houston-based company Cemvita, specializing in industrial biotechnology, revealed two significant developments exhibiting its prominence in advancing a sustainable bioeconomy. Firstly, the firm has surpassed expectations by enhancing the productivity of its distinctive microorganism, FermOil™, utilized in bioprocessing. This milestone was achieved at least six months ahead of the projected timeline. The enhancement, accomplished through the utilization of crude glycerol from biodiesel sectors, marks a notable achievement for Cemvita.
news.headline: Cemvita accelerates development of FermOil™ and achieves bioprocess productivity milestone ahead of schedule using biodiesel industries' crude glycerol.

news.summary: Ottawa, Canada - The initiative by The Sports Geek is allowing NFL enthusiasts to have a say in naming Canada's debut NFL squad through a fan-driven poll. Supporters can select from three options: the Blizzard, Northmen, and Grizzlies, aiming to establish a home base for the team in the country's capital. The voting process is open until May 28, 2025. Get involved in deciding the identity of the first NFL franchise in Canada!
news.headline: Fans can vote to name Canada's first NFL team - options are Blizzard, Northmen, and Grizzlies. Vote by May 28.

news.summary: Cetera, a leading financial advisor Wealth Hub, recently appointed Keyur Desai, a seasoned Silicon Valley executive, showcasing their dedication to data-driven innovation at the core of their strategy. The announcement was made on May 22, 2025, in San Diego. This move highlights Cetera's focus on leveraging technology and expertise to enhance their services.
news.headline: Cetera appoints Keyur Desai as Chief Data and Analytics Officer to drive growth with data-driven innovation.

news.summary: Wix.com Ltd (NASDAQ: WIX) released its fiscal Q1 results today, showing a 13% year-over-year revenue increase to $473.7 million, surpassing analyst expectations of $472.9 million. However, the adjusted EPS of $1.55 fell below the anticipated $1.60. The company reaffirmed its fiscal 2025 revenue forecast of $1.97 billion to $2 billion, lower than the expected $2.02 billion, with bookings projected at $2.03 billion to $2.06 billion. This guidance considers uncertainties in the Business Solutions segment, balancing potential volatility with the disappearance of foreign exchange challenges. Lior Shemesh, Wix's CFO, emphasized the significance of these results.
news.headline: Wix.com's Q1 revenue rose 13% to $473.7M, missing EPS estimates. Fiscal 2025 outlook is $1.97-2B vs analyst $2.02B.

news.summary: Booz Allen Hamilton (NYSE: BAH) is expected to report its quarterly earnings on May 23, 2025, with analysts predicting an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.61. Investors are eager to hear if the company surpasses estimates and provides positive guidance for the next quarter. In the previous quarter, Booz Allen Hamilton exceeded EPS by $0.03, resulting in a 0.0% drop in share price the next trading day. Over the last year, the company's shares are down by 19.42%. Market reactions are influenced not only by earnings performance but also by future guidance. The consensus rating for Booz Allen Hamilton is Neutral, as per 6 analyst ratings. Shares were trading at $128.42 on May 21. Analysts suggest understanding industry sentiments and expectations for informed investment decisions.
news.headline: Booz Allen Hamilton (NYSE: BAH) to report $1.61 EPS on May 23. Past performance shows mixed reactions to earnings. Stock at $128.42, down 19.42% in 52 weeks. Neutral rating by analysts.

news.summary: Frontline (NYSE: FRO) is set to announce its quarterly earnings on May 23, 2025, with analysts expecting an EPS of $0.66. The company previously missed EPS estimates by $0.07 in the last quarter, leading to a 0.0% drop in share price the following day. Frontline's stock traded at $17.7 on May 21, down 38.7% over the past 52 weeks. Market sentiment is mixed, with one analyst rating available. Investors are keen to see if the company will beat earnings estimates and provide positive guidance for future growth. The article emphasizes the significance of guidance in influencing stock prices.
news.headline: Frontline (NYSE: FRO) earnings preview: analysts expect $0.66 EPS, historical performance indicates potential market impact.
